chunks.text: Fall 2023 Newsletter - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter highlights recent developments and achievements in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It covers research breakthroughs, student accomplishments, and faculty updates for the fall semester of 2023.

The newsletter includes information on open faculty positions within the EECS department. These positions are aimed at recruiting top talent to contribute to teaching and research in areas such as artificial intelligence, robotics, and computer systems.
